name: Green Beans and Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and seed the Butternut squash, and cut into 2 x 1/2 x 1/2-inch sticks. Cook green beans in 2 inches of boiling water in a large skillet or Dutch oven for 6 minutes. Add squash; cook an additional 6-8 minutes, or until tender when pierced with a fork. Drain; rinse under cold running water. (Preparation can be completed up to 1 day ahead and refrigerated.)
2. Heat butter in the same pan over medium heat. Add garlic; sauté for 2 minutes. Stir in jelly, basil, parsley, salt, and pepper until the jelly is melted.
3. Add beans and squash; heat through. Remove from heat. Stir in lemon juice. Spoon onto a serving platter. Sprinkle with walnuts. Serve hot or warm.
